name: deepresearch2-claude-integration
description: Deep Research with Claude Code SDK integration

scripts.lint:citations: find . -name '*.csv' -o -name '*.ris' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo "🔍 Checking {}..." && cat {} | claude-code -p "You are a citation format linter. Check for: 1) Missing fields 2) Format issues 3) Invalid DOIs. Report: filename:line - issue" --output-format text'
scripts.lint:criteria: cat sr_screener/sample_criteria.json | claude-code -p 'Validate PICOTT criteria for completeness, clarity, and specificity. Return JSON with validation results.' --output-format json > criteria_validation.json
scripts.review:changes: git diff main | claude-code -p 'Review these Deep Research changes for: 1) Logic errors 2) Security issues 3) Performance problems. Be concise and specific.' --output-format text
scripts.generate:report: cat screening_results.json | claude-code -p 'Generate publication-ready systematic review report with PRISMA flow, statistics, and recommendations' --output-format text > screening_report.md
scripts.validate:structure: find sr_screener -name '*.py' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo "📋 Validating {}..." && cat {} | claude-code -p "Check Python code structure, imports, and best practices" --output-format text'
scripts.analyze:workflow: cat sr_screener/app.py | claude-code -p 'Analyze this Streamlit workflow for UX improvements and bottlenecks' --output-format json > workflow_analysis.json
scripts.fix:imports: git diff main --name-only | grep '\.py$' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'cat {} | claude-code -p "Fix import statements and remove unused imports. Return corrected code." --output-format text > {}.fixed && mv {}.fixed {}'
scripts.optimize:database: cat sr_screener/database.py | claude-code -p 'Suggest database query optimizations and schema improvements' --output-format text > db_optimization.md
scripts.test:generate: find sr_screener -name '*.py' -not -name 'test_*' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo "🧪 Generating tests for {}..." && cat {} | claude-code -p "Generate comprehensive pytest tests for this module" --output-format text > test_{}.py'
scripts.claude:pipeline: echo 'Running complete Claude pipeline...' && npm run lint:citations && npm run lint:criteria && npm run screen:citations && npm run generate:report
scripts.claude:review: echo '🔍 Claude Code Review Pipeline' && npm run review:changes && npm run validate:structure && npm run analyze:workflow

prompts.citation_linter: You are a citation format linter. Check for missing fields, format issues, and invalid DOIs.
prompts.code_reviewer: Review code for logic errors, security issues, and performance problems.
prompts.test_generator: Generate comprehensive pytest tests following best practices.
